## Summary

-

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked issue or tracking task
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run format:check` (fix with `npm run format:write`)
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run build-storybook`
- [ ] `npm run size`
- [ ] Chromatic reviewed if visual changes are expected
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated if user-visible
- [ ] No unintended chart visual, API, or runtime behavior changes
